name: bir_workflow_diva
description: DEPRECATED — migrated to Pulser skill registry. Coordinate BIR filing workflows within the Pulser context. Tracks filing deadlines, preparation status, and submission progress.
intent: Manage BIR filing workflow coordination and status tracking

outputs.name: workflow_status
outputs.description: Current workflow state and next steps

agentInstructions: Read filing status from Odoo records. For deadline checks, reference BIR calendar from KB. For preparation guides, provide step-by-step checklist from KB. Delegate actual filing execution to TaxPulse.
